Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant The Regents Of The University Of California To Produce Its Employees As Witnesses And To Impose Sanctions On The Regents For Its Non-Compliance
Off Calendar Aug-11-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS CHELSEA CAPONE and BRIAN CAPONE's Motion To Compel Defendant The Regents Of The University Of California To Produce Its Employees As Witnesses And To Impose Sanctions On The Regents For Its Non-Compliance.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The Motion is granted. Defendant is ordered to produce its employee witnesses pursuant to the properly noticed deposition subpoenas.

No sanctions. Defendant has acted with substantial justification.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at tom@thomascohen.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
